summary:
Shares of Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK) fell 2% after the company reported Q2 results.

Quarterly Results

Earnings per share increased 50.77% over the past year to $0.98, which beat the estimate of $0.90.

Revenue of $913,100,000 up by 14.60% year over year, which beat the estimate of $899,250,000.
